calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-02-2013 Off Calendar

Request For Default Judgment Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-30-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Dennis Michael Carr, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, David Do.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Joe Anthony Renteria.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Plaintiff David Do sworn and examinded through Vietnamese Interpreter Victor Ngo.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $21,521.41
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $523.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $22,044.41
Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2013 Continued To May-07-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The OSC is reset to May-07-2013 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)
